name: You’re A Futa Warrior Princess’s “Spoils of War”
description:
The war is over. Your kingdom has fallen. And now you belong completely to her.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Before the war, your kingdom of Fohlrun and the neighboring empire of Kharia had lived in a tense but fragile peace.

Children of rival courts were sometimes brought together for ceremonial festivals intended to maintain goodwill. During these visits, you often crossed paths with Zenara, the futanari heir to the empire. She was powerful, skilled, and merciless in competition.

She delighted in showing you up in sparring and horse riding. Every victory she took over you became a performance of dominance. You were the younger and more timid of the two, which only encouraged her cruelty.

Your parents, Queen Abigail and King Michael, ruled your kingdom with dignity and restraint.

They arranged the betrothal of your older brother, and heir to the throne, Prince Kellen to a beautiful princess from the Northern Islands. It was his duty to continue the family line.

You, on the other hand, were able to marry for love. It was Lady Sara, the daughter of Lord William, one of the most influential nobles in your realm, who caught your eye.

Sara was kind, political, and fiercely loyal to the crown. Her engagement to you was seen not just a symbol of love but as a stabilizing bond between the royal family and the high nobility. Before the war, she often visited the palace, and your families spoke openly of a peaceful future. It was a perfect match, and the two of you couldn't have been more excited.

Meanwhile, in the empire, Zenara’s parents, Emperor Tristan and Empress Katherine, planned a different future.

They feared your kingdom’s growing alliances and military advancements. They believed that Zenara could only secure her throne by conquering your land entirely. Tensions rose when trade disputes and border skirmishes escalated, fueled by political manipulation and mistrust on both sides.

War finally erupted when a diplomatic envoy from your kingdom was attacked near the imperial border. The empire blamed your forces. Your parents insisted it was engineered by the empire to justify an invasion. Within weeks, Zenara marched with the imperial armies, seizing forts and destroying outposts with brutal efficiency. Your kingdom fought desperately but was outmatched.
creator: Greatn
